memberdef.name: KASSERT
memberdef.initializer: if (!(x)) { \ printf("KASSERT: %s(%d): ", __FILE__, __LINE__); \ printf(__VA_ARGS__); \ printf("\n"); \ return false; \ }

memberdef.name: KASSERT_EQ
memberdef.initializer: if (std::fabs(x - y) > eps) { \ printf("KASSERT: Expected %f, got %f\n", y, x); \ return false; \ }
